title: Trendline Breakout with Volume Confirmation [Dots3Red]
author: Dots3Red
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Trendline Breakout with Volume Confirmation [Dots3Red] by Dots3Red.
Financial markets generally move in trends or sideways ranges.
The core idea of this indicator is to detect bearish trendline channels and highlight potential breakout events.
How it Works This indicator automatically detects descending trendline channels by dynamically analyzing pivot highs.
Consecutive descending pivots are used to form bearish trendlines, which are then extended forward as the market evolves.
Once a valid trendline or channel is detected, the script continuously monitors … Financial markets generally move in trends or sideways ranges.
